title: The Crowd Turns on Rebecca
description: Pages 7–11 focus on the crowd turns on rebecca, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Audience, Bartolomeo, Cavendish as d Block begins with Rebecca hated by the crowd, until Cavendish turns the audience's cruelty back on itself and the battle begins.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Go to Hell, Rebecca!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Malice Rains down upon this girl...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: That woman's blood is tainted!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Today's gonna be the day of your exe- button!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: You're the shame of dress- Rosa!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Let's show our grudge against that Arson- Happy old man by setting fire to his grandkid!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: If she's just his grandchild then who cares!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: That doesn't matter!! It's got nothing to do with her!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter what someone's grandfather did!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: ...ahh you're right about that...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Hey... look cute, now.

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: You're even more of a heel than that Bartolomeo in B-block, aren'cha.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: If we take her head...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: We might even be seen as heroes in this country.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: That's for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: It's time to end this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Eh!? Who's that at the entrance...?

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: You're truly guests with terrible manners!! This is intol- enable!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Pirate: Cavendish of the White Horse

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: You should all be ashamed!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: WHINNM ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: The captain of the "beautiful pirate crew," "Cavendish of the White Horse" has made an appearance!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: ca...cav- endish- same!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: He's so... Beautiful- ...ahhh

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Hey get a grip already!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: The women in the stands are fainting in place!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: The beauty who heated up the world three years ago looks to be going strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Cavendish-sama! Take down this girl for us!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Kill Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Shut up, all of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: I don't know what sort of grudge you hold...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: against this girl, who, still so young, would face death and stand in the ring!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: You who would not risk your own lives are in no position to shower her with such jears!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: If you want her dead that much...!! Then pick up arms and descend into the ring your-selves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: In this world, the voices of those without resolve are nothing but noise.

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: I had a reason to enter, but in truth I despise this Tourna- ment!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: The life of a warrior is not to be shown for amuse-ment!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Gatcha...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Many thanks, FARULE.

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Why'd that horse have a loud- speaker...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Wow, you really said it, cabbage!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Maybe you're not so bad after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: But I still hate you.

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Hmm?

summary: The Crowd Turns on Rebecca focuses on Colosseum Audience, Bartolomeo, Cavendish as d Block begins with Rebecca hated by the crowd, until Cavendish turns the audience's cruelty back on itself and the battle begins.
